features.description: Non-humanoid avatars need a separate retargeting profile that maps MediaPipe landmarks to creature-specific bone sets
Hand tracking → finger bone rotation mapping. Many models have finger bones but retargeting is not yet implemented
When face landmarks detect a hand near the face, IK solver moves avatar hand to face. Currently deferred for all models
MediaPipe face mesh → VRM blend shapes. Currently deferred. Requires models with blend shape support
Specialized rendering mode that shows only the hand model. For finger tracking experiments
Models with low automatic humanoid mapping need manual Blender bone map editing before conversion
Heavy models (>10MB VRM) need LOD levels or mesh decimation for mobile performance

critical_path_for_next_batch: Batch 1 (batman, iron-man, shrek): No feature dependencies — convert_then_test ready NOW
Batch 2 (asm2, t-800, spidermen): Inspect first, then convert_then_test — no feature deps
Batch 3 (jack-sparrow, elsa, teal-v2, buzz): manual_bone_map_cleanup needed first
Batch 5 (creatures): creature_profile_system needed — largest code investment
